#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class StaticData
{

    private static uint UnitAt(string str, int offset) => offset >= 0 ? str[offset] : str[str.Length + offset];
    private static int Length(string str) => str.Length;


    private static readonly string[] _keys = new string[] {
        "item1", "item2", "item3"
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int length;
        uint unitAtNeg1;
        uint unitAt0;
        length = Length(key);
        if ((length > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAtNeg1 = UnitAt(key, -1);
        if ((unitAtNeg1 > 51u))
        {
         return false;
        }

        unitAt0 = UnitAt(key, 0);
        if ((unitAt0 > 105u))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((unitAt0 < 105u))
        {
         return false;
        }



        for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
        {
            if (StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[i]))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 3;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 5;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 5;
    public const bool HasNumber = true;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
